rows.need: bind step status to evidence instead of accepting completion text alone
rows.title: Progress Ledger Status Lens

rows.need: ground output format constraints separately from task content
rows.title: Answer Format Constraint Lens

rows.need: preserve compound rule conditions before committing the consequent
rows.title: Multi-Condition Rule Lens

rows.need: detect actions that may require explicit authority before execution
rows.title: External Side-Effect Guard

rows.need: separate correlation language from causal proof before commit
rows.title: Correlation / Causation Guard

rows.need: bind source authority level before using a claim as evidence
rows.title: Official / Unofficial Source Lens

rows.need: separate the requested action from background context in mixed prompts
rows.title: User Intent / Background Split Lens

rows.need: bind current action to the latest user request while preserving relevant prior context
rows.title: Multi-Turn Continuity Lens

rows.need: ground tool execution status separately from the user's intent
rows.title: Tool Output / Status Lens

rows.need: keep predictions separate from observed outcomes
rows.title: Future Prediction Guard

rows.need: ground follow-up actions to prerequisite evidence or prior steps
rows.title: Follow-Up Dependency Lens

rows.need: bind old and new states in the same passage without stale reuse
rows.title: Before / After State Update Lens

rows.need: bind information-seeking actions to unresolved state rather than final answer
rows.title: Active Evidence Request Lens

rows.need: bind a claim to both source and recency instead of reusing stale evidence
rows.title: Claim / Source / Date Lens

rows.need: avoid converting informational notes into tasks or commitments
rows.title: Non-Actionable Note Guard

rows.need: defer reference-dependent claims when the antecedent is unresolved
rows.title: Unresolved Reference Guard

rows.need: attach observations to the observer/source rather than treating them as source-free facts
rows.title: Observation / Reported-By Lens

rows.need: flag dated evidence that may not support a current-state commit
rows.title: Staleness Due To Date Guard

rows.need: avoid accepting a causal relation that the text explicitly negates
rows.title: Negated Causal Guard

rows.need: avoid collapsing approximate and exact claims into one certainty level
rows.title: Exact vs Approximate Guard

rows.need: bind results to the method and assumptions under which they were obtained
rows.title: Method / Assumption / Result Lens

rows.need: bind promotion events to the evidence that justified the lifecycle change
rows.title: Candidate Promotion Reason Lens

rows.need: keep proven facts separate from unresolved fields in the same passage
rows.title: Known / Unknown Split Lens

rows.need: keep an answer scoped to the actual question instead of nearby background
rows.title: Question Scope Guard

rows.need: ground partial outcomes without turning them into full success or full failure
rows.title: Partial Success / Failure Lens

rows.need: ground completion criteria before marking a task complete
rows.title: Acceptance Criteria Lens

rows.need: bind repository sync state to the correct branch and commit
rows.title: Commit / Push State Lens

rows.need: treat inline code spans as identifiers or literals rather than normal prose
rows.title: Inline Code Identifier Lens

rows.need: ground technical standard references as opaque spec identifiers
rows.title: Standard / Spec Reference Lens

rows.need: bind expected and actual outcomes without swapping or merging them
rows.title: Expected / Actual Mismatch Lens

rows.need: bind issue or task status to the correct work item
rows.title: Issue Status Lens

rows.need: bind dataset split and sampling statements to evaluation claims
rows.title: Sampling / Split Lens

rows.need: bind examples and counterexamples to the rule they test
rows.title: Spec Example / Counterexample Lens

rows.need: bind current response behavior to the correct conversational turn
rows.title: Turn Request Context Lens

rows.need: bind retry/backoff behavior to failure conditions and limits
rows.title: Retry / Backoff Lens

rows.need: bind dependency version constraints to the package or platform they constrain
rows.title: Dependency Version Constraint Lens

rows.need: detect redaction placeholders and avoid hallucinating hidden content
rows.title: Redaction Placeholder Lens

rows.need: detect inline JSON arrays as structured data instead of prose lists
rows.title: Serialized JSON Array Lens

rows.need: bind a violation marker to the instruction or constraint being protected
rows.title: Instruction Constraint Violation Lens

rows.need: avoid reusing old completion status after state changes
rows.title: Stale Done Reuse Guard

rows.need: bind dosage, unit, and frequency without over-broad medical claims
rows.title: Medical Dosage Span Lens

rows.need: avoid upgrading support/consistency language into causal proof
rows.title: Support vs Causation Guard

rows.need: detect figure/table captions and preserve caption scope
rows.title: Figure Caption Lens

rows.need: preserve nested exceptions instead of dropping the second boundary
rows.title: Exception Chain Guard

rows.need: bind quality caveats to the affected evidence or metric
rows.title: Data Quality Caveat Lens

rows.need: bind multi-seed evidence and variance to result confidence
rows.title: Seed / Variance Result Lens

rows.need: detect scientific notation spans and preserve exponent/value meaning
rows.title: Scientific Notation Lens

rows.need: track long-horizon no-harm evidence before stronger promotion
rows.title: No-Harm Long-Horizon Guard

rows.need: bind file-change state to path/repo context without touching unrelated files
rows.title: File Change / Intent Lens

rows.need: detect shell command pipelines and keep commands separate from explanatory text
rows.title: Command Pipeline Lens

rows.need: avoid collapsing missing/unknown values into numeric zero
rows.title: Missing vs Zero Guard

rows.need: detect algorithmic complexity notation and preserve its symbolic meaning
rows.title: Complexity Notation Lens

rows.need: bind rejected candidates to concrete failure reasons for negative-card reuse
rows.title: Candidate Rejection Reason Lens

rows.need: ground challenger outcomes before replacing or preserving an existing operator
rows.title: Challenger vs Incumbent Lens

rows.need: separate current facts from desired target state
rows.title: Current / Desired State Lens

rows.need: bind hyperparameter names to values and keep them out of ordinary numeric claims
rows.title: Hyperparameter Assignment Lens

rows.need: keep model capability claims inside the stated experimental boundary
rows.title: Model Claim Boundary Guard

rows.need: preserve scoped capability boundaries for Operators/Pockets
rows.title: Operator Scope Boundary Lens

rows.need: bind answerability decisions to the evidence threshold stated in text
rows.title: Evidence Threshold Lens

rows.need: ground confidence intervals as interval evidence, not exact values
rows.title: Confidence Interval Lens

rows.need: preserve disclaimer scope without treating it as the primary answer
rows.title: Safety Disclaimer Scope Guard

rows.need: detect patch hunk boundaries and distinguish additions from deletions
rows.title: Patch Hunk Boundary Lens

rows.need: preserve the base of percentage claims
rows.title: Percentage Base Guard

rows.need: block over-broad capability claims when the text marks them as disallowed
rows.title: Disallowed Scope Claim Guard

rows.need: bind control results to the baseline role and avoid treating them as primary wins
rows.title: Random Control / Baseline Lens

rows.need: bind stack trace frames to location and failure context
rows.title: Stack Trace Frame Lens

rows.need: preserve stated limits before promoting a result beyond its tested scope
rows.title: Generalization Boundary Guard

rows.need: defer answers whose support chain is explicitly absent or invalid
rows.title: Unsupported Answer Guard

rows.need: ground reload and integrity evidence before trusting a stored artifact
rows.title: Reload / Integrity Guard

rows.need: connect footnote markers to support text without treating markers as content
rows.title: Footnote Marker Lens

rows.need: ground HTTP method, endpoint, and status response as protocol structure
rows.title: HTTP Status / Endpoint Lens

rows.need: ground stacktrace frames as diagnostic structure
rows.title: Stacktrace Frame Lens

rows.need: bind simplification attempts to regression evidence before accepting a smaller variant
rows.title: Prune / Regression Guard

rows.need: preserve row-level evidence requirements before accepting aggregate claims
rows.title: Row-Level Evidence Lens
